genre_refs: Cinco de Mayo / margarita-and-sombrero stereotype imagery
description: A glossy, AI-generated/composited political attack image set at a port of entry beneath a large overhead sign reading 'UNITED STATES BORDER'; an American flag flies at left and green lane signs ('READY LANE', 'CARS') and bollards are visible. In the foreground two older men in dark business suits and ties (styled to caricature Democratic politicians, the right-hand figure strongly resembling a senior Senate Democrat in glasses) sit at a small table wearing brightly colored Mexican sombreros and clinking two margarita glasses in a celebratory toast. On the table in front of them is a colorful hand-lettered sign reading 'I LOVE ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS', flanked by a bowl of tortilla chips, a bowl of salsa, a small potted cactus and a serape/striped placemat. Visual style: hyper-realistic, saturated, clearly AI-generated/photo-composited satire timed to Cinco de Mayo (tweet: 'Happy Cinco de Mayo to all who celebrate!'). Messaging/propaganda technique: mockery and caricature that uses ethnic stereotype props (sombreros, margaritas, chips) to portray Democrats/political opponents as gleefully celebrating and welcoming illegal immigration; it ridicules the opposition while reinforcing the administration's hardline border stance. Target audience: Trump supporters and online partisans, intended as a shareable derogatory meme.
notable_text: UNITED STATES BORDER | I LOVE ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS
